mod3._comment: Claude Code channel client. Start with: claude --dangerously-load-development-channels server:mod3

_toolManifest.note: Tool manifest for documentation; capabilities and tools are declared by clients/channel_client.py.

inbound.description: Messages from the dashboard arrive as channel notifications

tools.name: mod3_dashboard_post
tools.description: Send text to the mod3 dashboard chat panel.

tools.name: mod3_speak
tools.description: Synthesize text to speech and play it through the Mod3 daemon.
